Current Price List
Shown prices are the current values used for totals.
Off by default. Keep it hidden once you’re using the floating toolbar.
Clears the current drawing and inventory (you will be asked to confirm).
Use Set Project Folder in the top toolbar to save .json into a Projects folder inside your chosen version folder (Chrome/Edge on https:// or localhost).
Save the current project as a .json file to your computer, or load a previously saved .json file.
Exports the current drawing as a PNG — cropped to content, no gridlines.
Paste your Make.com (or Zapier) webhook URL below. Every time you Save JSON, the estimate PDF will be generated and sent to the webhook automatically — no extra button needed.
